summary: Actions not pinned to SHA (actionlint violation per spec: `actions/checkout@v4` should be commit SHA). DateTime parsing logic duplicated: Run-Cleanup.ps1 (~line 48-54) and ConvertTo-Artifact in ArtifactCleanup.ps1 (~line 35-40) both parse datetimes differently. Test file tests/ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 referenced in workflow but not provided. Workflow not validated against actionlint. Core PowerShell logic is well-structured with good error handling; would need action pinning fix and test implementation before shipping.
